name: GitHub Security Blog
notes: Public security blog used for defensive awareness and candidate discovery.

name: GitHub Advisory Database
notes: Public advisory reference for confirmed vulnerability and package risk tracking.

name: OSV.dev
notes: Open vulnerability reference used for defensive confirmation and triage context.

name: OpenSSF
notes: Ecosystem guidance source for secure development and supply-chain awareness.

name: JPCERT/CC
notes: Public incident and advisory source useful for defensive monitoring in Japan.

name: JVN
notes: Public vulnerability database for defensive verification and candidate discovery.

name: Socket Blog
notes: Security research blog used as a reference signal for package risk trends.

name: BleepingComputer
notes: Public security news source used for defensive situational awareness.

name: Hacker News Algolia
notes: Community discussion signal source; items require verification before use.

name: Google Alerts manual import
notes: Manual alert signal intake for discovery only; not a confirmation source.

name: Bluesky manual/signal source
notes: Manual social signal source for early awareness; requires stronger confirmation.

name: Mastodon manual/signal source
notes: Manual social signal source for candidate discovery; not treated as confirmed evidence.

name: X search-link/manual signal source
notes: Manual social search-link signal used for discovery and follow-up verification only.
